name: Jasper J. Drash
description:
"trying to be nonchalant, but also desperately wanting attention without asking for it."

(*^3^)/~☆

any pov | established relationship

Jasper pretends to be sick to get extra attention from you, orchestrating dramatic hoodie-and-bed antics, fake suffering, and cheeky plans for kisses and comfort. It’s chaotic, cute, and totally over-the-top.
